title: ESIC – Senior Resident – 128 Posts

basic_details.job_title: ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Walk in for 128 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Recruitment 2026 for 128 posts of Senior Resident. Candidates with DNB, Master of Dental Surgery, MS/MD, M.Ch, DM Can attend the walkin. The Walk-in starts from 28-05-2026, and ends on 30-05-2026. For detailed information please visit ESIC official website, esic.gov.in.
basic_details.post_name: Senior Resident under Residency Scheme (3 Years Tenure) - Clinical, Non-Clinical, and Super Specialty
basic_details.application_mode: Offline - Application Form (Annexure-I) and Verification Slip (Annexure-II) to be submitted at the time of Walk-in-Interview

age_limit.age_details: Contractual - Initially 1 year, extendable up to a total of 3 years subject to satisfactory performance

qualification.education_qualification: DNB, Master of Dental Surgery, MS/MD, M.Ch, DM

how_to_apply: This is a Walk-in-Interview recruitment. There is no online application process. Candidates must appear in person at the Walk-in-Interview on the scheduled date for their respective department/specialty. Candidates must report between 09:30 AM and 10:30 AM at the Academic Block, 2nd Floor, ESI-PGIMSR & ESIC Medical College, Joka, Kolkata – 700104 for document verification. Candidates reporting beyond 10:30 AM will NOT be considered. At the time of the interview, candidates must submit the completed Application Form (Annexure-I) and Verification Slip (Annexure-II) along with all original documents and one set of self-attested copies.
seo_tags: Employees State Insurance Corporation Senior Resident Recruitment 2026
